author: dylancomas
description: A manuscript editor with integrated StoryLine scene routing, formatted exports, and Antidote Connect support. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Dylan Comas
manifest.description: A manuscript editor with integrated StoryLine scene routing, formatted exports, and Antidote Connect support.
manifest.name: Noveler - A StoryLine Expansion

name: Noveler - A StoryLine Expansion

releases.author: DylanComas
releases.description:
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/DylanComas/noveler-a-storyline-expansion/compare/1.2.1...1.2.2

Changes:
- Lang files are downloaded locally.

releases.author: DylanComas
releases.description:
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/DylanComas/noveler-a-storyline-expansion/compare/1.2.0...1.2.1

Changes:
- Updated minimum app version to: 1.12.7

releases.author: DylanComas
releases.description:
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/DylanComas/noveler-a-storyline-expansion/compare/1.1.1...1.2.0

Added:
- English language baked in the `main.js`
- Auto-download of other languages

releases.author: DylanComas
releases.description:
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/DylanComas/noveler-a-storyline-expansion/compare/1.0.4...1.1.1

Added:
- Language support: English / French

releases.author: DylanComas
releases.description:
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/DylanComas/noveler-a-storyline-expansion/compare/1.0.3...1.0.4

Change:
- Opening Mode and Measurement System now share the first row.
- Default Font and Font Size share the second row, font first.
- Margin preview is larger and follows the selected paper aspect ratio.
- Its blue boundary reacts live to all four margin values.

Fix:
- Font and page-format dropdowns no longer overflow or obscure labels.
- Page-format labels were shortened for readability.

releases.author: DylanComas
releases.description:
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/DylanComas/noveler-a-storyline-expansion/compare/1.0.2...1.0.3

Add:
- Added Default manuscript font under Editor settings.
- Added Default manuscript font size.
- New defaults are Times New Roman, 12 pt.

Fix: 
- Existing untouched Georgia 18 defaults migrate automatically.
- Settings changes support unsaved-state detection and Editor-section undo.

releases.author: DylanComas
releases.description:
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/DylanComas/noveler-a-storyline-expansion/compare/1.0.1...1.0.2

Fix:
- New StoryLine scenes load directly into the existing Noveler tab.
- The existing view is no longer reconfigured through `setViewState`.
- Noveler becomes the active tab after loading the scene.
- Any transient Markdown tab is removed only after confirming the same scene loaded successfully.

releases.author: DylanComas
releases.description:
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/DylanComas/noveler-a-storyline-expansion/compare/1.0.0...1.0.1

Fix:
- Scenes directly under Scenes/Scene.md now open correctly.

releases.author: DylanComas
releases.description:
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/DylanComas/noveler-a-storyline-expansion/compare/0.9.5...1.0.0

Added:
- Annotations by Right-Click on a selected text
- Full rework of the Settings
- CTRL+Enter to add a new page
- Persistent display of properties for the active scene

releases.author: DylanComas
releases.description:
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/DylanComas/noveler-a-storyline-expansion/compare/0.9.0...0.9.5

Added:
- Create entries in StoryLine's Codex with right click on selected text.
